message:
feat(config): add camelCase serde aliases for nested settings and PI_CLEAR_ON_SHRINK env fallback

Add #[serde(alias = "...")] attributes throughout Config sub-structs
so that JSON settings files can use either snake_case or camelCase
field names, matching upstream Pi config conventions:

- steering_mode: add "queueMode" alias (upstream name)
- CompactionSettings: "reserveTokens", "keepRecentTokens"
- BranchSummarySettings: "reserveTokens"
- RetrySettings: "maxRetries", "baseDelayMs", "maxDelayMs"
- ImageSettings: "autoResize", "blockImages"
- TerminalSettings: "showImages", "clearOnShrink"

Also add PI_CLEAR_ON_SHRINK environment variable fallback for
terminal_clear_on_shrink() using the same testable-lookup pattern
as other env-backed settings, with 3 tests verifying config/env
precedence and camelCase parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
